messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Write a Python script using python-pptx to generate a 14-slide corporate standard presentation for logistics investors detailing supply chain optimization. The output file must be named "logistics_supply_chain.pptx" and all content should be in Portuguese. Use the standard 16:9 Widescreen slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)

PRIMARY_COLOR = RGBColor(10, 38, 71)       # dark navy
SECONDARY_COLOR = RGBColor(30, 136, 229)    # blue
ACCENT_COLOR = RGBColor(255, 193, 7)        # gold
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(240, 240, 240)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(33, 33, 33)
MEDIUM_TEXT = RGBColor(100, 100, 100)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=CARD_BG):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 200, 200)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.12), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4))
    tf_t = title_box.text_frame
    p_t = tf_t.paragraphs[0]
    p_t.text = title
    p_t.font.size = Pt(16)
    p_t.font.bold = True
    p_t.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    p_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.3), height - Inches(0.7))
    tf_b = body_box.text_frame
    tf_b.word_wrap = True
    p_b = tf_b.paragraphs[0]
    p_b.text = body
    p_b.font.size = Pt(12)
    p_b.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
    p_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(1.5), Pt(4))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.2), Inches(0.38), Inches(6), Inches(0.4), text, font_size=14, bold=True, color=SECONDARY_COLOR)


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(10.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.3))
    tf = footer_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = f"Logística & Investimentos | {page_number}"
    p.font.size = Pt(9)
    p.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(150, 150, 150)
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.RIGHT


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(180, 180, 180)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)

        icon_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.25), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))
        tf_i = icon_box.text_frame
        p_i = tf_i.paragraphs[0]
        p_i.text = "📷"
        p_i.font.size = Pt(36)
        p_i.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


# ── Slide Builders ────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A2647")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(10), Inches(1.2),
                 "Otimização da Cadeia de Suprimentos", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.8),
                 "Estratégias Avançadas para Logística Moderna e Eficiência Operacional",
                 font_size=20, color=RGBColor(174, 213, 255))

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(3), Pt(4))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.6), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                 "Apresentação para Investidores | Q4 2024", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(174, 213, 255))

    add_footer(slide, "01")


def slide_02_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Sumário"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Sumário", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    items = [
        ("01", "Visão Geral do Mercado"),
        ("02", "Desafios Principais da Logística"),
        ("03", "Soluções Estratégicas"),
        ("04", "Integração Tecnológica"),
        ("05", "Análise de Custos e ROI"),
        ("06", "Estudos de Caso"),
        ("07", "Roadmap de Implementação"),
        ("08", "Gestão de Riscos e Resumo Financeiro"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(items):
        y = Inches(1.2 + i * 0.65)
        num_box = add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), num, font_size=18, bold=True, color=SECONDARY_COLOR)
        label_box = add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(1.2), y, Inches(6), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=16, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, "02")


def slide_03_market_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Visão Geral do Mercado"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Visão Geral do Mercado", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    stats = [
        ("US$ 8.5 Bi", "Tamanho do Mercado Global"),
        ("12.4%", "Taxa de Crescimento Anual (CAGR)"),
        ("3.2M+", "Empresas Logísticas Ativas"),
        ("67%", "Adoção de IA na Cadeia de Suprimentos"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(stats):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, Inches(2.0), value, label)

    add_footer(slide, "03")


def slide_04_challenges(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Desafios Principais"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Desafios Principais", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    challenges = [
        ("Aumento de Custos Operacionais", "Custos com combustível e mão de obra aumentaram 23% nos últimos 3 anos"),
        ("Gargalos na Última Milha", "60% dos atrasos ocorrem na entrega final ao cliente"),
        ("Falta de Visibilidade", "Apenas 45% das empresas têm rastreamento em tempo real completo"),
        ("Sustentabilidade", "Pressão regulatória por redução de emissões em 40% até 2030"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    gap_h = Inches(0.3)
    y_start = Inches(1.3)

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(challenges):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT
        y = y_start + i * (Inches(1.4) + gap_h)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, Inches(1.3), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, "04")


def slide_05_solutions(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Soluções Estratégicas"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Soluções Estratégicas", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    solutions = [
        ("Automação de Armazéns", "Robótica e AGVs reduzem custos operacionais em 35%"),
        ("IA Preditiva", "Previsão de demanda com precisão de 94% usando machine learning"),
        ("Roteirização Inteligente", "Redução de 28% nos tempos de entrega com algoritmos otimizados"),
        ("Blockchain para Rastreabilidade", "Transparência total da cadeia do fornecedor ao consumidor final"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    gap_h = Inches(0.3)
    y_start = Inches(1.3)

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(solutions):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT
        y = y_start + i * (Inches(1.4) + gap_h)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, Inches(1.3), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, "05")


def slide_06_technology(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Integração Tecnológica"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Integração Tecnológica", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    techs = [
        ("IoT & Sensores", "Monitoramento em tempo real de frota e condições de carga"),
        ("ERP Integrado", "Sistema unificado para gestão de estoque e pedidos"),
        ("Plataforma Cloud", "Escalabilidade e acesso remoto a dados operacionais"),
        ("Analytics Avançado", "Dashboards executivos com KPIs em tempo real"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(techs):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, Inches(2.0), title_text, body_text)

    # Central icon placeholder
    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/central_icon.png", Inches(5.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(1.7), Inches(1.7))

    add_footer(slide, "06")


def slide_07_cost_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Análise de Custos"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Análise de Custos", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Transporte", "Armazenagem", "Mão de Obra", "Tecnologia", "Manutenção"]
    chart_data.add_series("Distribuição (%)", (35, 20, 25, 12, 8))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(1.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(7.0), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    for point in series.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR

    add_footer(slide, "07")


def slide_08_roi_projections(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Projeções de ROI"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Projeções de ROI", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Ano 1", "Ano 2", "Ano 3", "Ano 4", "Ano 5"]
    chart_data.add_series("Investimento em Logística (%)", (15, 28, 45, 62, 78))
    chart_data.add_series("Retorno Líquido (%)", (10, 20, 35, 50, 65))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS,
        Inches(1.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(7.0), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for i, series in enumerate(plot.series):
        series.format.line.color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR if i == 0 else ACCENT_COLOR
        series.format.line.width = Pt(3)

    add_footer(slide, "08")


def slide_09_case_study1(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Estudo de Caso 01 — LogTech Brasil"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Estudo de Caso 01 — LogTech Brasil", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    metrics = [
        ("Redução de Custos", "-32%"),
        ("Tempo de Entrega", "-45%"),
        ("Satisfação do Cliente", "+28 pts"),
        ("Eficiência Operacional", "+41%"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, Inches(1.8), label, value)

    desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.0), Inches(12), Inches(2.5))
    tf_d = desc_box.text_frame
    tf_d.word_wrap = True
    p_d = tf_d.paragraphs[0]
    p_d.text = ("A LogTech Brasil implementou um sistema integrado de IA e automação em 3 centros de distribuição, "
                "resultando em economia anual de R$ 12 milhões e aumento significativo na capacidade operacional.")
    p_d.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_d.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT

    add_footer(slide, "09")


def slide_10_case_study2(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Estudo de Caso 02 — GlobalFreight SA"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Estudo de Caso 02 — GlobalFreight SA", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    metrics = [
        ("Cobertura de Rota", "98.7%"),
        ("Redução de Emissões", "-38%"),
        ("Novos Clientes", "+156"),
        ("Receita Adicional", "R$ 24M/ano"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, Inches(1.8), label, value)

    desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.0), Inches(12), Inches(2.5))
    tf_d = desc_box.text_frame
    tf_d.word_wrap = True
    p_d = tf_d.paragraphs[0]
    p_d.text = ("A GlobalFreight SA expandiu sua operação para 12 países utilizando blockchain para rastreabilidade "
                "e IoT para monitoramento de condições de transporte, alcançando certificação ISO 50001 em sustentabilidade.")
    p_d.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_d.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT

    add_footer(slide, "10")


def slide_11_roadmap(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Roadmap de Implementação"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Roadmap de Implementação", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Diagnóstico e Planejamento"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Implementação de IoT e Sensores"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Integração de IA Preditiva"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Automação de Armazéns Piloto"),
        ("Q1 2026", "Expansão para Todos os CD's"),
        ("Q2 2026", "Otimização Contínua e Escala"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (period, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap)
        y = y_pos + row * Inches(2.0)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, Inches(1.7), period, desc)

    # Connecting line shapes between milestones
    for i in range(len(milestones) - 1):
        col_a = i % 3
        row_a = i // 3
        col_b = (i + 1) % 3
        row_b = (i + 1) // 3

        x1 = start_x + col_a * (card_w + gap) + card_w / 2
        y1 = y_pos + row_a * Inches(2.0) + Inches(1.7)
        x2 = start_x + col_b * (card_w + gap) + card_w / 2
        y2 = y_pos + row_b * Inches(2.0)

        if col_b > col_a or row_b > row_a:
            line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, x1 + Inches(0.1), y1 - Inches(0.05), card_w / 3, Pt(4))
            line_shape.fill.solid()
            line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
            line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, "11")


def slide_12_risk_management(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Gestão de Riscos"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Gestão de Riscos", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    risks = [
        ("Risco Operacional", "Alto", "Mitigação: Planos B redundantes e contratos flexíveis"),
        ("Risco Tecnológico", "Médio", "Mitigação: Pilotos antes da escala completa"),
        ("Risco Regulatório", "Baixo", "Mitigação: Equipe jurídica dedicada e monitoramento ativo"),
        ("Risco de Mercado", "Médio", "Mitigação: Diversificação geográfica e de clientes"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    gap_h = Inches(0.3)
    y_start = Inches(1.3)

    for i, (risk_name, level, mitigation) in enumerate(risks):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT
        y = y_start + i * (Inches(1.4) + gap_h)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, Inches(1.3), risk_name, f"Nível: {level} — {mitigation}")

    add_footer(slide, "12")


def slide_13_financial_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Resumo Financeiro"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Resumo Financeiro", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Receita Logística", "Serviços Tech", "Consultoria", "Outros"]
    chart_data.add_series("Distribuição (%)", (45, 25, 20, 10))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(6.5), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    chart.has_legend = True
    if chart.legend is not None:
        chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    series = plot.series[0]
    colors = [SECONDARY_COLOR, ACCENT_COLOR, PRIMARY_COLOR, RGBColor(150, 200, 255)]
    for i, point in enumerate(series.points):
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i % len(colors)]

    summary_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.3), Inches(6), Inches(4))
    tf_s = summary_box.text_frame
    tf_s.word_wrap = True
    p_s = tf_s.paragraphs[0]
    p_s.text = ("Investimento Total Estimado: R$ 85 milhões\n"
                "Retorno Esperado em 3 anos: 210%\n"
                "Ponto de Equilíbrio: 18 meses\n"
                "Receita Projetada Ano 5: R$ 420M")
    p_s.font.size = Pt(16)
    p_s.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT

    add_footer(slide, "13")


def slide_14_contact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A2647")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(10), Inches(1.0),
                 "Obrigado", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(9), Inches(0.6),
                 "Vamos transformar sua cadeia de suprimentos juntos", font_size=20, color=RGBColor(174, 213, 255))

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(3), Pt(4))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    contact_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(8), Inches(2.0))
    tf_c = contact_box.text_frame
    tf_c.word_wrap = True
    p_c = tf_c.paragraphs[0]
    p_c.text = ("Contato: investidores@logtechbrasil.com\n"
                "Telefone: +55 (11) 3456-7890\n"
                "Website: www.logtechbrasil.com\n"
                "Endereço: Av. Paulista, 1000 — São Paulo, SP")
    p_c.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_c.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(174, 213, 255)

    add_footer(slide, "14")


# ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_agenda(prs)
    slide_03_market_overview(prs)
    slide_04_challenges(prs)
    slide_05_solutions(prs)
    slide_06_technology(prs)
    slide_07_cost_analysis(prs)
    slide_08_roi_projections(prs)
    slide_09_case_study1(prs)
    slide_10_case_study2(prs)
    slide_11_roadmap(prs)
    slide_12_risk_management(prs)
    slide_13_financial_summary(prs)
    slide_14_contact(prs)

    prs.save("logistics_supply_chain.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
